item.name: Ligaka Guppy
item.description:
Commonly found in Marsh Ligaka, this species of freshwater fish is known for its striking hue.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Lured by the promise of new discoveries, some learned Sharlayans choose to embark upon a scholarly tour of Tural in their twilight years. Clearly, creative naming was not the forte of the aging naturalist who located this species of guppy in Marsh Ligaka.
